creator: com-freebsd-bugzilla@sabi.net
text:
I ran into this when upgrading from to 10.2 - I got a panic every few minutes whereas my system had been running without problems for months prior to the upgrade.

I tried disabling net.link.bridge.pfil_bridge (which seems to be the situation the patch addresses) but it did not help.

Unfortunately I don't have time to test this further, as I need a working system and have thus reverted back to 10.1, but I can provide some cores and configuration info if helpful for debugging.  (It's a pretty simple router configuration, bridging Ethernet and Wi-Fi interfaces.)

Thanks.
